task: I need to write a short note to include with a card, and I want it to sound natural and not get bogged down in extra wording. Can you help me keep it brief and suitable for the situation?

turns.agent_response:
Absolutely — send me:

- who it’s for
- the occasion
- the tone you want, if any (warm, casual, formal, funny)

I’ll turn it into a short natural note.

user_simulator.text:
Here’s the note, if you need something to work with:

Happy birthday. Hope you have a good day and a better year ahead.

That’s about all I want on it. Plain, not gushy.

turns.agent_response:
Sure — here are a few plain, natural options:

- Happy birthday. Hope you have a good day and a better year ahead.
- Happy birthday. Wishing you a good day and a better year.
- Happy birthday. Hope the day is good and the year ahead is even better.

If you want, I can make it a little warmer or a little more casual while still keeping it short.

user_simulator.text: That works. The first one is fine — plain enough, not overdone.
